x0 (zero): 00000000
x1 (ra): 00000005
x2 (sp): 0000000A
x3 (gp): 0000000F
x4 (tp): 00000005
x5 (t0): 00000000
x6 (t1): 0000000F
x7 (t2): 0000000F
x8 (s0): 000000A0
x9 (s1): 00000000
x10 (a0): FFFFFFF0
x11 (a1): FFFFFFFF
x12 (a2): 00000006
x13 (a3): 00000007
x14 (a4): 00000002
x15 (a5): 00000001
x16 (a6): 00000064
x17 (a7): 0000000F
x18 (s2): 00000000
x19 (s3): 002B9000
x20 (s4): 0000006C
x21 (s5): 00000074
x22 (s6): 000003E7
x23 (s7): 0000007C
x24 (s8): 0000002A
x25 (s9): 00000000
x26 (s10): 00000000
x27 (s11): 00000000
x28 (t3): 00000000
x29 (t4): 00000000
x30 (t5): 00000000
x31 (t6): 00000000
